name: Kodama Drift Chassis
description: Build manual for the Onisiki Kodama RWD drift chassis.
notes: Reference card: a chassis kit, not software. Large manual (~39 MB), so it caches slowly on first open. Onisiki 403s datacenter IPs (CI) while serving residential ones fine - validate_catalog treats 403 as alive. Their own index links several PDFs via the dev.onisiki.com staging host, which 403s everywhere; always use www.onisiki.com.
